sections.paragraph: plur. f. ruins, desolations, Psa 73:18 74:3 . The etymology is doubtful, and even the reading is uncertain in these places, as in Psa 74:3, in some editt., as that of Athias, there stands מַשּׂוּאֹות. I regard מַשּׁוּאֹות as being the same as מְשֹׁואֹות, מְשׁוּאֹות (from the root שֹׁוא), Dagesh being inserted in the first radical in the Rabbinic manner in the forms יַלִּין, מַלִּינִים (from לוּן, לִין), יַלִּיזוּ Pro 4:21, from לוּז. It comes to about the same thing if we regard מַשּׁוּאֹות as coming from נָשָׁא, the signification being taken from שֹׁוא, but the former is preferable; compare מִשֹּׁוט.
